tagline: Compact industrial humidifier for small growing areas and tissue culture labs.
sellingPoints: The GROW-03L delivers precise 3L/h humidification for sensitive growing environments. Its compact footprint and built-in water filter make it ideal for tissue culture labs and small grow spaces where hygiene and precision matter most.

tagline: Mid-range industrial humidifier with dual steam vents for even moisture distribution.
sellingPoints: The GROW-06D doubles the output with dual 110mm steam vents for even moisture distribution across wider growing areas. Ideal for small greenhouses and hydroponic systems requiring consistent humidity levels for optimal plant growth.

tagline: 9L/H industrial humidifier for medium-scale greenhouse operations.
sellingPoints: The GROW-09D is sized for medium commercial greenhouses, delivering 9L/h with 352m³/h air volume for rapid humidity recovery after ventilation events. Customizable voltage supports global OEM/ODM projects.

tagline: High-output 12L/H humidifier for large commercial growing environments.
sellingPoints: The GROW-12D provides 12L/h humidity output with powerful 680m³/h air volume, ensuring uniform mist distribution across large greenhouse spans. Essential for tropical crops and vine vegetables that require consistently high ambient humidity.

tagline: Heavy-duty industrial humidifier for large-scale commercial growing facilities.
sellingPoints: The GROW-15D steps into heavy-duty territory with 15L/h output and 1500W power, covering up to 500m². Designed for tropical crop facilities and large mushroom houses where maintaining 80-95% RH is critical to productivity.

tagline: Ultra-high output humidifier for industrial-scale greenhouses and climate chambers.
sellingPoints: The GROW-24D features triple 110mm steam vents for maximum coverage area, delivering 24L/h to industrial mega-greenhouses. At 600×540×520mm, it is compact relative to its output, making it versatile for both floor and raised installation.

tagline: Maximum-capacity industrial humidifier for the largest growing operations.
sellingPoints: The GROW-42D is our most powerful humidifier at 42L/h — covering 800m²+ for the largest industrial growing complexes. Suitable for cascading multi-unit setups in mega-greenhouses with centralized climate management.
